29 class BasicIndexManager :
30  public IIndexManager
31 {
32 public:
33  class ItemAbstractFamily : public IAbstractFamily {
34  public:
35  ItemAbstractFamily(const Arcane::IItemFamily * family);
36  virtual ~ItemAbstractFamily() { }
37 
38  public:
39  IIndexManager::IAbstractFamily * clone() const;
40 
41  public:
42  Int32 maxLocalId() const;
43  void uniqueIdToLocalId(Arcane::Int32ArrayView localIds, Arcane::Int64ConstArrayView uniqueIds) const;
44  Item item(Int32 localId) const;
45 
46  SafeConstArrayView<Integer> owners(Arcane::Int32ConstArrayView localIds) const;
47  SafeConstArrayView<Int64> uids(Arcane::Int32ConstArrayView localIds) const;
48  SafeConstArrayView<Int32> allLocalIds() const;
49 
50  const Arcane::IItemFamily * family() const { return m_family; }
51 
52  private:
53  const Arcane::IItemFamily * m_family;
54  const Arcane::ItemInternalArrayView m_item_internals;
55  };
56 
57  class MyEntryEnumeratorImpl;
58  class MyEntryImpl;
59 
60  public:
62  BasicIndexManager(Arcane::IParallelMng * parallelMng);
63 
65  virtual ~BasicIndexManager();
66 
68  void init();
69 
71  bool isPrepared() const { return m_state == Prepared; }
72 
74  void setTraceMng(Arcane::ITraceMng * traceMng);
75 
77  void prepare();
78 
80 
81  void stats(Integer & globalSize,
82  Integer & minLocalIndex,
83  Integer & localSize) const;
84 
86 
87  Integer globalSize() const;
88 
90 
91  Integer minLocalIndex() const;
92 
94 
95  Integer localSize() const;
96 
98  EntryEnumerator enumerateEntry() const;
99 
101  ScalarIndexSet buildScalarIndexSet(const String name, Arcane::IItemFamily * item_family);
102  void defineIndex(ScalarIndexSet& set, const Arcane::ItemGroup & itemGroup);
103 
104  ScalarIndexSet buildScalarIndexSet(const String name, const Arcane::ItemGroup & itemGroup);
105 
107  ScalarIndexSet buildScalarIndexSet(const String name, const Arcane::IntegerConstArrayView localIds, const IAbstractFamily & family);
108 
110  ScalarIndexSet buildScalarIndexSet(const String name, const IAbstractFamily & family);
111 
113 
114  VectorIndexSet buildVectorIndexSet(const String name, const Arcane::ItemGroup & itemGroup, const Integer n);
115 
117 
118  VectorIndexSet buildVectorIndexSet(const String name, const Arcane::IntegerConstArrayView localIds, const IAbstractFamily & family, const Integer n);
119 
121 
122  VectorIndexSet buildVectorIndexSet(const String name, const IAbstractFamily & family, const Integer n);
123 
125 
126  void removeIndex(const ScalarIndexSet & entry, const Arcane::ItemGroup & itemGroup);
127 
128  Integer getIndex(const Entry & entry, const Arcane::Item & item) const ;
129 
131  void getIndex(const ScalarIndexSet & entry, const Arcane::ItemVectorView & items, ArrayView<Integer> indexes) const;
132 
134  Arcane::IntegerSharedArray getIndexes(const ScalarIndexSet & entry) const;
135 
137  Arcane::SharedArray2<Integer> getIndexes(const VectorIndexSet & entries) const;
138 
140  Arcane::IParallelMng * parallelMng() const { return m_parallel_mng; }
141 
143  void setMaxNullIndexOpt(bool flag) {
144  m_max_null_index_opt = flag ;
145  }
146 
147  Integer nullIndex() const {
148  ARCANE_ASSERT((m_state==Prepared),("nullIndex is valid only in Prepared state")) ;
149  if(m_max_null_index_opt)
150  return m_global_entry_offset+m_local_entry_count ;
151  else
152  return -1 ;
153  }
154 
155 
156  public:
157  void keepAlive(const IAbstractFamily * family);
158 
159  private:
160  Arcane::IParallelMng * m_parallel_mng;
161  Integer m_local_owner;
162 
163  enum State { Undef, Initialized, Prepared } m_state;
164 
165  Arcane::ITraceMng * m_trace;
166 
167  struct InternalEntryIndex {
168  InternalEntryIndex(MyEntryImpl * e, Integer lid, Integer kind, Int64 uid, Integer index, Integer creation_index, Integer owner)
169  : m_entry(e)
170  , m_uid(uid)
171  , m_localid(lid)
172  , m_kind(kind)
173  , m_index(index)
174  // , m_creation_index(creation_index)
175  , m_owner(owner)
176  { }
177  MyEntryImpl * m_entry;
178  Int64 m_uid;
179  Integer m_localid, m_kind, m_index;
180  // Integer m_creation_index;
181  Integer m_owner;
182  bool operator==(const InternalEntryIndex & m) const { return m.m_entry == m_entry && m.m_localid == m_localid; }
183  };
184 
185  typedef std::vector<InternalEntryIndex> EntryIndexMap;
186 
187  Integer m_local_entry_count;
188  Integer m_global_entry_count;
189  Integer m_global_entry_offset;
190  Integer m_local_removed_entry_count ;
191  Integer m_global_removed_entry_count ;
192 
193  bool m_max_null_index_opt ;
194 
195 
197  typedef std::map<String,MyEntryImpl*> EntrySet;
198  EntrySet m_entry_set;
199 
201  Integer m_creation_index;
202 
204  static const Integer m_mesh_kind_shift;
205  static const Integer m_family_kind_shift;
206  Integer m_abstract_family_base_kind;
207  std::map<Arcane::IMesh *, Integer> m_item_family_meshes;
208  std::map<Integer, boost::shared_ptr<IAbstractFamily> > m_abstract_families;
209  std::map<const IAbstractFamily *, Integer> m_abstract_family_to_kind_map;
210 
211  struct EntryIndexComparator
212  {
213  inline bool operator()(const BasicIndexManager::InternalEntryIndex & a,
214  const BasicIndexManager::InternalEntryIndex & b) const;
215  };
216 
218  Entry getEntry(const String name) const;
219 
220  protected:
222  struct EntrySendRequest;
223  struct EntryRecvRequest;
224 
225  protected: // M�thodes prot�g�s en attendant une explicitation du besoin
226 
227 
228  private:
229  Entry buildEntry(const String name, const IAbstractFamily * itemFamily, const Integer kind);
230  void defineIndex(const Entry & entry, const Arcane::IntegerConstArrayView localIds);
231  void parallel_prepare(EntryIndexMap & entry_index);
232  void sequential_prepare(EntryIndexMap & entry_index);
233  inline bool isOwn(const IAbstractFamily::Item & item) const { return item.owner() == m_local_owner; }
234  inline bool isOwn(const InternalEntryIndex & i) const { return i.m_owner == m_local_owner; }
235  void reserveEntries(const EntryIndexMap & entry_index);
236  Integer addNewAbstractFamily(const IAbstractFamily * family);
237  Integer kindFromItemFamily(const Arcane::IItemFamily * family);
238 };

243 END_ALIEN_NAMESPACE
